case_title: PATEL, AMIT DBA ALBERT HOTEL VS. JACK INGLE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, AMIT DBA ALBERT HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT INGLE, JACK YOUNG, SUSIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
